虽然是多女主，但塑造的确实不错，着笔分量合适，不像很多后宫文女主就一名字很单薄"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745501012,"group_id":"7322304923511557182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/WprezTQw3tBfNTHIiyrC8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a251573c13974124a14c14cdfce75d68~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614947&x-signature=ar2Wrxea0728V9FFX2jOM6Nzoo8%3D","user_id":"807489138854004","user_name":"礼物之王x9"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"807489138854004","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322304923511557182","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女】【幽默】【感情戏足】【后期含糖】【心声】
林恒穿书《美人录》，成为炮灰反派
只要按照（正·反）剧本流程走过场，苟到最后，就能成为绝世强者。
不料，女主们竟然能听到他的心声，后续无论正·反剧情如何过渡，他都面临着被主角扼杀的风险！
【无脑师尊被掌握修为跌落秘密，还不是成了主角后宫】
【师姐这么冰清玉洁的仙子可惜了，最后被主角忽悠去了花楼卖艺】
【逆天老爹要让主角当接班人，活该落个家破人亡下场】
林恒本想着安心走剧情，却发现女主越来越不对劲起来！
“师尊，你修为怎么没有跌落？”
“师姐误会啊，那天晚上天黑真的是师兄！”
“哎哟，师尊师姐求你们了，叶天就在隔壁......”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/38b0b5f290725393b7130ae8c88fcfb0","author":"天行见道","author_id":"","book_id":"7322304923511557182","book_name":"被偷听心声后，师尊师姐不对劲了","book_short_name":"求求师尊师姐","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7323198782256988734","read_count":"175608","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4135850"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"1876","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,反派,穿书,架空,东方玄幻,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1e05e3e424cb5bfb3e693a6e4d4c13cc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285747&x-signature=QbgJfTr1586KjGv2Ln%2BnvJqxASs%3D","tomato_bo ok_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1864376544406491","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1383"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212202277C4A329105B0B0B007B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读37小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":132056,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":16183},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1753007173,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7542899268634755864","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哈哈哈哈哈，真不错啊，细节描写不错，很多事情不要只看一笔带过，但又还着深深韵味，回味无穷[做鬼脸]主角好色，腹黑，显眼包，喜欢抱大腿。这本书我是直接一口气追到催更的，真的很不错，前两天昼夜不停的看听小说，很有意思，而且本书可以说是多纪元（不同时代的各路主角（气运者）相互争斗） 感觉有股群星争霸的感觉，女主们各有特色让人流连忘返，古典修仙描绘的玲离尽致，我最喜欢的就是主角探案时一路反转和护妻时的激情互喷还有在女帝面前的豪情壮志，好多地方都可以见得作者大大的文笔很好，看过很多修仙小说。
    诸位值得一看[赞][做鬼脸][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756219978,"group_id":"7322304923511557182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哟！还不错，欧。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny5LV6ZHEm+tgqXf33uBLScfMcR1AHJuEQzDawBCi/eM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f362a19727df41c897bd3cb5362dcdf6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615579&x-signature=3sZAulPSHb4rR5vABoWXnRk70X0%3D","user_id":"3373756883149848","user_name":"琅琊斑耑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3373756883149848","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322304923511557182","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女】【幽默】【感情戏足】【后期含糖】【心声】
